testcase.name: @AfterMethod tearDown
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.WebDriverException: java.io.IOException: Output closed Build info: version: '4.41.0', revision: '9fc754f' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.11' Driver info: driver.version: ChromiumDriver at org.openqa.selenium.remote.http.jdk.JdkHttpClient$4.send(JdkHttpClient.java:327) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.http.jdk.JdkHttpClient$4.close(JdkHttpClient.java:346) at org.openqa.selenium.devtools.Connection.close(Connection.java:237) at org.openqa.selenium.devtools.DevTools.close(DevTools.java:65) at java.base/java.util.Optional.ifPresent(Optional.java:178) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.RemoteWebDriver.quit(RemoteWebDriver.java:498) at org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver.quit(ChromiumDriver.java:421) at base.CrossBrowser.quitDriver(CrossBrowser.java:31) at base.BaseTest.tearDown(BaseTest.java:21) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) Caused by: java.io.IOException: Output closed at java.net.http/jdk.internal.net.http.websocket.WebSocketImpl.sendClose(WebSocketImpl.java:313) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.http.jdk.JdkHttpClient$4.lambda$send$2(JdkHttpClient.java:292) at org.openqa.selenium.remote.http.jdk.JdkHttpClient$4.send(JdkHttpClient.java:317) ... 41 more ...
